meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes Subcommittee on the taxonomy of phototrophic bacteria. Minutes of the meetings, 27 August 2003, Tokyo, Japan
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml:
Minute 1. Call to order.
The closed meeting was held on 27 August 2003 at the Funabori Tower in Tokyo, Japan. The meeting was called to order by the chairman, J. F. Imhoff, at 18 : 05.
